description_long: This house features a flat-roofed, adobe-style structure with high parapet walls and a simple, rectangular footprint. The exterior is finished in a light beige color, with small, rectangular windows and a few red awnings above select openings. There are two main volumes: a larger open-roofed courtyard area and a smaller, raised section with a central doorway and a few steps leading up to it. The house includes a prominent exterior staircase and several doorways, some with colored awnings or coverings. The overall design is minimalistic, with few decorative elements, and the flat roof and thick walls suggest a style suited for hot, arid climates.
description: A flat-roofed, adobe-style house with high parapet walls, small windows, and red awnings, featuring a courtyard and exterior staircase.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with two doorways, one with a blue-tiled step and another with a red awning, and the high parapet walls.
description_view_1: This view highlights the exterior staircase and the open courtyard area, with the raised central section visible in the background.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals two doorways with red awnings and the simple, unadorned back wall, as well as the open courtyard layout.
description_view_3: This side view shows the main entry with a blue-tiled step, the raised section, and the extended flat roof area.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a blue-tiled step, no porch, and minimal decorative elements; some doors have red awnings.
